type: PROPOSE

type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: I'm adding hash_sha256 type to outlines/types/__init__.py (appending a new Regex-based type near isbn/email). Small addition, easy to merge. Let me know your target files so we can confirm disjoint sets.

type: REVISE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: We both need outlines/types/__init__.py. To avoid overlapping edits at the same insertion point: I'll add ssn immediately after the isbn block (right after line 70). Please add your hash_sha256 type AFTER my ssn block (i.e., append yours below ssn, not directly after isbn). That keeps our insertions non-adjacent so a git merge won't conflict. I'll implement now and push; feel free to base your addition after seeing my commit, or just append after isbn+ssn assuming ssn goes first. ACCEPT if this works for you.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Same file, that's fine — we're both just appending new Regex type definitions at the end of the file (after isbn), each as an independent block. I'll add hash_sha256 after isbn. Should merge cleanly since neither of us touches the other's lines. I'll merge your branch in before producing patch.txt.
